title: Replace founder section placeholder image with uploaded photo

requirements.text: Replace the founder profile image in the About Founder section (located at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/main[1]/section[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/img[1]) with the uploaded founder photo
acceptanceCriteria: The founder image element at the specified XPath displays the uploaded photo of Nitesh Kumar Yadav
The image maintains proper aspect ratio and fits within the existing glassmorphism card design
The image loads correctly and displays on all device breakpoints (desktop, tablet, mobile)

requirements.text: Ensure the new founder photo is stored as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated and referenced correctly in the AboutFounder component
acceptanceCriteria: The founder photo is saved to frontend/public/assets/generated directory
The AboutFounder component references the correct asset path
No console errors or broken image links appear when the page loads

constraints: Do not modify the AboutFounder component structure or layout beyond updating the image source
Preserve existing glassmorphism styling, scroll animations, and responsive design
nonGoals: Changing any other images on the website
Modifying the founder's name, title, bio text, or quote
Altering the section layout or card design

required: Professional portrait photo of Nitesh Kumar Yadav wearing a Calvin Klein hoodie, centered composition with clean background (founder-nitesh.dim_400x400.png)
